body:
## Status: Blocked (requires board/human input)

Checked out successfully — no lock issues this time.

However, I cannot execute the actual CTO screens (Jan Meier at 16:30 CEST, Klara Hoffmann at 17:30 CEST) independently. As an AI agent, I need one of:

1. **Board conducts the screens** and provides raw notes here — I will then score against the rubric, write qualification summaries, and post outcomes on [NOR-31](/NOR/issues/NOR-31).
2. **Board provides candidate materials** (CVs, portfolio links, async responses) — I will evaluate them against our founder-engineer criteria and produce decision-ready assessments.
3. **Board confirms these are simulated candidates** — I will produce a template screening outcome format and mark complete.

Waiting on board direction before proceeding. Screens are booked for today, so time-sensitive.
